Get Started →

Build without boundaries

Sui is a boundless platform to build rich and dynamic on-chain assets from gaming to finance.

Check eligibility →
A STEP-FUNCTION CHANGE IN BLOCKCHAIN DESIGN

Why Sui?

Sui is the first permissionless Layer 1 blockchain designed from the ground up to enable creators and developers to build experiences that cater to the next billion users in web3.

Fast A*F

Horizontally scalable,
instant finality, low fees.

Digital assets unlocked

Create more utility into NFTs and store directly on-chain.

Designed for real people

  • Your assets live directly in your account, not in someone else's smart contract.
  • Human readable signing requests: Know exactly what you're giving permission for.
  • Easily onboard users: Send an asset now, create an account later.
    [coming soon]

Developer Resources

Get started with tutorials, documentation, SDK, APIs, reference implementations and more.

Get Started →

Safe & secure smart contracts

Spend less time fixing smart contracts, more time building cool sh*t.

Learn about Move →

Green

Sui uses proof of stake and is designed for maximum efficiency.

Join the movement. Follow along, meet fellow builders on Discord or get updates.
